description_long: This is a mid-top athletic sneaker featuring a predominantly white upper with light pink and gray accents. The shoe has a layered construction, with a suede-like material on the toe cap and side overlays, and a synthetic or leather material forming the main body. The midsole and outsole are thick and robust, with pink highlights and sculpted details for added style and support. The heel features a decorative pink emblem and a pull tab, while the tongue is padded and includes a lace-up closure with white laces. Perforations along the sides suggest breathability, and the overall design is sporty and modern, suitable for urban environments.
description: A white mid-top sneaker with pink and gray accents, featuring a layered construction, lace-up closure, and decorative heel emblem. The design is sporty, modern, and suitable for urban wear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the white laces, padded tongue, and rounded toe with gray and pink overlays.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the layered side panels, pink midsole accents, and perforations for breathability.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the decorative pink emblem, black vertical strip, and heel pull tab.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the sculpted midsole, side perforations, and a small shield-shaped detail.
